title: Ay's Overworld Debris
description: A simple mod that adds Debris to the Overworld
body:
![Ay's Overworld Debris](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d1379a8ba5d4e9e59fc763c70196c88090a28ae_0.webp)

---

Ay's Overworld Debris adds Debris to the overworld. The Debris spawns at Deepslate layers between -18 and -64.

Debris spawns the same as in the Nether. 



Hope you have fun and as always if you have any ideas for the mod, leave them in the comments and I'll try to add them to the mod!

If you find any issues with the mod, please leave them in the comments and I'll try to fix them as soon as possible!

You can use the mod in any of your modpacks! 

Also check us out on CurseForge! https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ays-overworld-debris
